title: Enterprise E2E + RBAC Audit — Data Retention Policy Enforcement
description: test_phase5_enterprise.py, test_phase10_e2e.py, and test_rbac_audit.py cluster with test_data_retention.py. The data retention manager has per-category policy CRUD but does not enforce deletion — it marks records as expired without executing actual DB purge or S3 object expiry. RBAC audit tests confirm role checks exist but do not verify data retention policies are RBAC-gated.
missing: Data retention enforcer: background job that runs nightly, finds records past retention_days, and physically DELETEs them from each domain SQLite DB
S3 object expiry: for evidence stored in S3EvidenceStore, set object lifecycle policy via boto3 to auto-expire after retention_days
RBAC gate on retention policy management: only users with role 'data_privacy_officer' or 'admin' can create/modify retention policies; audit all changes
